```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if not s:
        return ""
    
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + rev_s
    
    failure = [0] * len(combined)
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = failure[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = failure[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        failure[i] = j
    
    lps_length = failure[-1]
    add_part = s[:len(s) - lps_length]
    
    return s + add_part[::-1]

import sys
input_str = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(input_str))
```
